creator: KOT@MATPOCKuH.Ru
text:
Hello!

telegrap-purple port for build and run requires pidgin:
BUILD_DEPENDS= pidgin:net-im/pidgin
RUN_DEPENDS=   pidgin:net-im/pidgin

This dependencies should be corrected to net-im/libpurple

I disabled this dependencies and successfully build and used via net/finch (without pidgin and any X11 libraries)
